Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 8
Received: 0

Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText(/Projects/i) Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText(/Projects/i) resolved to 7 elements: 1) Projects Portal aka getByLabel('Projects Portal').getByText('Projects Portal') 2) Projects aka getByLabel('Projects', { exact: true }).getByText('Projects') 3) Projects aka getByRole('navigation').getByText('Projects') 4)

Projects Portal

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'Projects Portal' }) 5) My projects aka getByText('My projects') 6) All projects aka getByText('All projects') 7) Projects framework dashboard for PD monthly review aka getByText('Projects framework dashboard') Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText(/Projects/i)
TC-03: Projects Portal UI baseline (single tab only)
projects page has a title and correct URL (keep Edge open)
